title: Storm Summoner Scene
description: Scene configuration for Storm Summoner MIDI controller

ui_module.description: UI module to display when this scene loads (e.g. beat, space)

scope.description: Scope display channels (up to 4). Each entry is "" (off), a param target name (e.g. lfo1, expression), or "cc:<n>" for a device CC. Only written when at least one channel is active.

midi_channel.description: Per-scene MIDI channel override (0 = use global, 1-16 = specific channel)

note_channel.description: MIDI channel for note output from continuous sources (0 = use scene channel, 1-16 = specific channel)

trs_type.description: Per-scene TRS MIDI polarity override (0 = use global, 1 = Type A, 2 = Type B, 3 = TS, 4 = Both)

program_number.description: Program change value for this scene (0-127)

bank_number.description: Bank number for this scene (0-127, used when bank_select_mode is enabled)

send_pc_on_load.description: Send program change when loading this scene

cc_defaults.description: Per-scene default CC values. Sparse: only CCs the user has assigned a value appear here. Each entry is sent on scene load and seeds the live CC cache used for x_variants / x_noop mode resolution. CCs flagged x_mandatory in the device definition are required and always present.

value.description: Default value to send on scene load

on_load.description: Actions to execute when scene loads (for pedal initialization)

on_play.description: Actions to execute when transport starts playing (fresh start only, not resume)

touchwheel_mode.description: Touchwheel behavior mode (storage enum; web editor uses user-facing modes including Disabled, Notes, Tempo Nudge)

touchwheel_mode_prev.description: Touchwheel mode saved before CV/Gate velocity takeover; restored when takeover ends

touchwheel_lfo_target.description: Which LFO(s) the touchwheel affects in LFO rate/depth modes

touchwheel_initial_value.description: Initial value (0-127) for touchwheel endless encoder; scaled to 14-bit in Double CC mode

touchwheel_style.description: Touchwheel style: odometer (~15 positions), endless (full range), bipolar (pitch bend only)

note_track.description: Note Track: incoming MIDI Note On numbers (within the global Note Track range) drive this continuous mapping

cc_triggers.description: Incoming MIDI CC triggers (when global MIDI Control is enabled)

action.description: Optional action; omit or type=none when unassigned

sustain.description: Actions for sustain events (default: CC64 toggle)

sostenuto.description: Actions for sostenuto events (default: CC66 toggle)

expr_switch.description: Action for expression switch mode (single action; matches device)

cv_velocity_mode.description: Velocity mode for CV NOTE input mode

cv_velocity.description: Fixed velocity value for CV NOTE mode

cv_trigger_threshold.description: Threshold percent (0-100) for CV Trigger mode

cv_trigger_debounce_ms.description: Debounce time in ms before CV Trigger fires (0 = Immediate)

cv_trigger_action.description: Action for CV Trigger mode; omit or type=none when unassigned

expression_velocity_mode.description: Velocity mode for expression note output

proximity_velocity_mode.description: Velocity mode for proximity note output

als_velocity_mode.description: Velocity mode for ambient light sensor note output

tilt_x_velocity_mode.description: Velocity mode for tilt X note output

tilt_y_velocity_mode.description: Velocity mode for tilt Y note output

tilt_x_tempo_nudge_pct.description: Percent of scene BPM to swing around center for tilt X (OUTPUT_TYPE_TEMPO_NUDGE)

tilt_x_tempo_nudge_direction.description: Tempo nudge direction for tilt X (0=both, 1=faster only, 2=slower only)

tilt_y_tempo_nudge_pct.description: Percent of scene BPM to swing around center for tilt Y (OUTPUT_TYPE_TEMPO_NUDGE)

tilt_y_tempo_nudge_direction.description: Tempo nudge direction for tilt Y (0=both, 1=faster only, 2=slower only)

expression_tempo_nudge_pct.description: Percent of scene BPM to swing around center for expression (OUTPUT_TYPE_TEMPO_NUDGE)

expression_tempo_nudge_direction.description: Tempo nudge direction for expression (0=both, 1=faster only, 2=slower only)

cv_tempo_nudge_pct.description: Percent of scene BPM to swing around center for CV (OUTPUT_TYPE_TEMPO_NUDGE)

cv_tempo_nudge_direction.description: Tempo nudge direction for CV (0=both, 1=faster only, 2=slower only)

proximity_tempo_nudge_pct.description: Percent of scene BPM to swing around center for proximity (OUTPUT_TYPE_TEMPO_NUDGE)

proximity_tempo_nudge_direction.description: Tempo nudge direction for proximity (0=both, 1=faster only, 2=slower only)

touchwheel_tempo_nudge_pct.description: Percent of scene BPM to swing around center for touchwheel (OUTPUT_TYPE_TEMPO_NUDGE)

touchwheel_tempo_nudge_direction.description: Tempo nudge direction for touchwheel (0=both/bipolar, 1=faster only, 2=slower only)

touchwheel_tempo_nudge_return.description: Return speed after touchwheel tempo nudge release (0=instant, 1=fast, 2=medium, 3=slow)

touchwheel_aftertouch_return.description: Return speed after touchwheel aftertouch release (0=instant, 1=fast, 2=medium, 3=slow)

touchwheel_tempo_floor.description: Minimum BPM when touchwheel mode is set_tempo

touchwheel_tempo_ceiling.description: Maximum BPM when touchwheel mode is set_tempo

als_tempo_nudge_pct.description: Percent of scene BPM to swing around center for ambient light (OUTPUT_TYPE_TEMPO_NUDGE)

als_tempo_nudge_direction.description: Tempo nudge direction for ambient light (0=both, 1=faster only, 2=slower only)

lfo1_tempo_nudge_pct.description: Percent of scene BPM to swing around center for LFO 1 tempo nudge routing

lfo2_tempo_nudge_pct.description: Percent of scene BPM to swing around center for LFO 2 tempo nudge routing

range.description: Input voltage range for audio (bipolar ranges only)

sensitivity.description: Gain (0-255 maps to 0.25x-64x exponential curve, set by calibration)

polarity.description: Output polarity (attract=louder is higher, repel=louder is lower/ducking)

bpm.description: Tempo in beats per minute for this scene (integer or one decimal place)

clock_source.description: Tempo clock source for this scene

beat_divider.description: Beat division for this scene (what note value triggers beat events)

use_transport.description: When true, animation follows transport controls (play/stop). When false, animation always runs at current BPM.

send_clock.description: When true, scene sends MIDI clock messages. When false, no MIDI clock is sent regardless of tempo settings.

lfo1_velocity_mode.description: Velocity mode for LFO1 note output

lfo2_velocity_mode.description: Velocity mode for LFO2 note output

sample_hold.description: Sample and Hold output mapping (CC, curve, polarity)

output_type.description: Output type: cc, note, lfo_rate/lfo_depth (with lfo_target), lfo1_rate/lfo1_depth/lfo2_rate/lfo2_depth (LFO cross-modulation), rtg_rate, sh_rate, pitch_bend, or tempo_nudge

lfo_target.description: Which LFO(s) to target when output_type is lfo_rate or lfo_depth

cc_number.description: Primary MIDI CC (mirrors first active cc_numbers entry when present)

cc_numbers.description: Active CC slots for this source (compact list; trailing zeros omitted)

base_note.description: Base MIDI note, typically middle C (when output_type=note)

note_latch.description: When true, notes hold until release timer expires (when output_type=note)

note_release_ms.description: Release delay in ms when latch is on (when output_type=note)

polyphony.description: Polyphony mode: mono (single voice) or poly (up to 4 voices)

middle_value.description: Output at raw=64 (sensor rest). 3-point linear mapping: raw 0 -> min_value, 64 -> middle_value, 127 -> max_value.

idle_value.description: Idle value (64 for CC bipolar, 60 for NOTE mode)

rate_mode.description: Rate mode: free/Time (Hz-based) or tempo/Division (note division sync)

start_mode.description: Start mode: running (starts when scene loads), paused (requires action to start), or transport (follows transport state)

trigger_timing.description: When LFO Start action is triggered: immediate (start now), beat (wait for next beat), bar (wait for bar start)

repeat.description: When true, LFO loops infinitely. When false, runs one cycle and stops (one-shot mode).

reset_phase.description: When true, LFO restarts from beginning on enable. When false, continues from previous position.

restore_on_stop.description: When true, sends the waveform's starting value (phase 0) when LFO stops.

floor.description: Output floor: minimum value the LFO is allowed to emit (0-127). Combined with ceiling to scale the output range.

ceiling.description: Output ceiling: maximum value the LFO is allowed to emit (0-127). Combined with floor to scale the output range.

resolution_mode.description: Per-cycle step count selection: auto (smart fixed-rate), coarse (16), medium (32), fine (64), or manual (uses manual_steps).

manual_steps.description: Number of steps per cycle when resolution_mode=manual.

start_mode.description: Start mode: running (start immediately), paused (wait for toggle), transport (follow play/stop)

rate_mode.description: Rate source: free (Hz-based) or sync (BPM-synced, one step per beat)

glide.description: When true, uses pitch bend for smooth gliding between notes

generator.description: Generator type: random (LFSR-driven note in note_min..note_max) or shepard (octave-spaced voices ascending/descending one semitone per tick with bell-curve velocity)

shepard_direction.description: Direction of Shepard motion (only used when generator=shepard)

shepard_layout.description: Voice layout for Shepard mode: single (all voices share note_channel) or multi (voice N goes to (note_channel + N) % 16). Only meaningful when smooth/glide is on.

shepard_fade.description: Per-voice fade source for smooth Shepard mode: none (bell curve only at retrigger), cc11 (CC11 expression per channel), or poly_at (polyphonic aftertouch per voice)

shepard_style.description: Smoothness style for smooth Shepard mode: stream (retrigger every semitone, continuous bend), wide (retrigger every shepard_wide_semis semitones using wider bend), crossfade (retrigger every semitone with brief overlap via fade source)

shepard_wide_semis.description: Retrigger spacing in semitones for the wide Shepard style (only used when shepard_style=wide)

start_mode.description: Start mode: running (start immediately), paused (wait for toggle), transport (follow play/stop)

glide.description: Enable smooth transitions between values (auto-scaling steps based on delta)

action.description: Action for this touchpad; type=none when unassigned

actions.description: Legacy format; migrated to action on load

type.description: Action type name. Consolidated families use 'variant' to pick the operation. 'tempo' supports Set/Hold/Cycle/Tap/Increment/Decrement/Downbeat; 'control' supports Set/Hold/Cycle; 'scene' supports Set/Increment/Decrement; 'preset' supports Set/Hold/Cycle/Increment/Decrement; 'transport' supports Play/Stop/Record (legacy 'pause' aliases Stop); 'touchwheel' supports Hold/Cycle; 'lfo' supports Start/Stop/Toggle/Modify (Modify carries optional per-parameter overrides; absent fields keep the scene's LFO config in place); 'clock' supports Toggle/Hold/Burst; 'cut' supports Toggle/Hold; 'ui' supports Set/Hold/Cycle; 'param' supports Hold/Cycle; 'rtg' supports Toggle/Hold/Step/Modify; 'sample_hold' supports Toggle/Hold/Step/Modify. 'piano_pedal' is a singleton hold action whose 'cc' field picks which switch-style MIDI CC fires on press (127) / release (0); supported CCs are 64 (Damper), 66 (Sostenuto), 67 (Soft), 68 (Legato), 69 (Hold 2). Legacy tempo_* (tap_tempo, set_tempo, tempo_inc, tempo_dec, tempo_hold, tempo_cycle), control_* (control_change, control_hold, control_cycle), scene_* (scene_inc, scene_dec, scene_next, scene_prev), preset_* (preset_inc, preset_dec, preset_hold, preset_cycle, program_next, program_prev, pc), transport_* (transport_play, transport_stop, transport_pause, transport_record) plus the bare verbs (play, stop, pause, record), touchwheel_hold / touchwheel_cycle and the older tw_mode_hold / tw_mode_cycle (now migrated to touchwheel with variant=hold/cycle), the legacy sustain / sostenuto types (now migrated to piano_pedal with cc=64 / cc=66), the legacy lfo_start / lfo_stop / lfo_toggle / lfo_shape types (now migrated to lfo with variant=start/stop/toggle/modify; lfo_shape's per-press waveform cycle is collapsed to a single waveform override), the legacy clock_toggle / clock_hold / clock_burst types (now migrated to clock with variant=toggle/hold/burst), the legacy cut_toggle / cut_hold types (now migrated to cut with variant=toggle/hold), the legacy set_ui / ui_hold / ui_cycle types (now migrated to ui with variant=set/hold/cycle), the legacy param_hold / param_cycle types (now migrated to param with variant=hold/cycle), the legacy rtg_toggle / rtg_hold types (now migrated to rtg with variant=toggle/hold), the legacy sample_hold_toggle / sample_hold_hold types (now migrated to sample_hold with variant=toggle/hold), and the legacy type='step' with step_target (now migrated to rtg or sample_hold with variant=step) are accepted for backward compatibility and migrated to the consolidated form on load. They will be removed in a future schema revision.

variant.description: Secondary operation discriminator for consolidated action families. Used by type='tempo' (tap/set/increment/decrement/hold/cycle/downbeat), type='control' (set/hold/cycle), type='scene' (set/increment/decrement), type='preset' (set/hold/cycle/increment/decrement), type='transport' (play/stop/record; legacy pause aliases stop), type='touchwheel' (hold/cycle), type='lfo' (start/stop/toggle/modify), type='clock' (toggle/hold/burst), type='cut' (toggle/hold), type='ui' (set/hold/cycle), type='param' (hold/cycle), type='rtg' (toggle/hold/step/modify), and type='sample_hold' (toggle/hold/step/modify). Omit for singleton types.

timing.description: When action takes effect: immediate (default), beat (next beat), beat_N (specific beat 1-16), bar_N (downbeat of bar N from scene load or transport position), transport (on transport fresh-start downbeat, requires scene use_transport)

repeat.description: Whether action repeats at the specified division

probability.description: Chance of firing on each repeat (10-100%, only used when repeat=true)

pattern_length.description: Step pattern length (0=disabled, 2-8=enabled, only used when repeat=true)

pattern_mask.description: Bitmask of active steps (bit 0=step 1, only used when pattern_length>=2)

transport_trigger.description: Deprecated: use timing=transport. Migrated to timing on load.

raise_flag.description: Set scene flag to 1 after action completes (when flag system enabled)

morph.description: Enable smooth value transition (control hold/cycle, tempo set/hold/increment/decrement/cycle, randomize)

morph_steps.description: Step resolution for morph: auto (smart), coarse (8), medium (16), fine (32), manual

morph_timing.description: Timing mode: feel (curated), duration (lasts FOR N), sync (ends ON moment)

release_mode.description: Follow-Up: when to perform the release-phase work of a hold action. always (default), if_held (>= threshold), if_quick (< threshold). Honored by hold variants of control, tempo, preset, touchwheel, and clock.

release_threshold_ms.description: Follow-Up: hold duration threshold in ms (used when release_mode is not always)

note.description: MIDI note number, or 254 for a random root (C2-C7) on each press.

velocity.description: Note velocity preset value, or 254 for random loud-to-quiet on each press.

random_floor.description: Lower bound for random root note (C2-C7 range). Used when note=254.

random_ceiling.description: Upper bound for random root note. Used when note=254.

voices.description: Number of chord voices (root plus stacked +2/+3 semitone steps).

bass.description: When true, root stays at selected pitch and upper voices are transposed up one octave.

aftertouch.description: When true, sends tempo-synced poly aftertouch swell while the pad is held.

number.description: Stable manifest scene index (0–127). Survives reordering and renaming; not list position.

then.description: Scene increment/decrement variants carry no parameters.

number.description: Program number (0-127 without bank, 0-16383 with bank mode)

release_preset.description: Preset to set on release (ignored when release_to_original is true)

release_to_original.description: When true, the release phase restores whatever preset was active on the device at press time, instead of using release_preset. The captured value is transient and not persisted.

then.description: Preset increment/decrement variants carry no parameters.
Transport operations (play/stop/record; legacy pause aliases stop) carry no parameters.

bpm.description: Tempo to set when triggered (BPM). 0 = randomize within random_floor..random_ceiling on each trigger. 65535 = restore the scene's configured BPM.

random_floor.description: When bpm=0 (random), lower bound of the random BPM range.

random_ceiling.description: When bpm=0 (random), upper bound of the random BPM range.

inc_amount.description: Step size in BPM applied each time the action fires (0.1-20.0). The runtime clamps the resulting tempo to [20, 300]. Defaults to 1 if omitted.

fractional.description: When 1, allow fractional BPM steps for this action (overrides integer-only device default for tap/nudge paths).
When 1, tap tempo may resolve to 0.1 BPM precision.

mode.description: User-facing touchwheel mode index on press (13 user modes; see firmware touchwheel_mode_mapping for the list)

mode2.description: User-facing touchwheel mode index on release (used when release_to_original is false)

release_to_original.description: If true, release restores the touchwheel mode captured at press time instead of using mode2

modes.description: User-facing touchwheel mode indices to cycle through (13 user modes; see firmware touchwheel_mode_mapping for the list)

waveform.description: Override LFO waveform (0=Sine, 1=Triangle, 2=Square, 3=Saw Up, 4=Saw Down, 5=Sample&Hold, 6=Bin, 7=Glider, 8=Stray). 254 = randomize on each trigger. Omit to keep the scene's configured waveform.

rate_mode.description: Override rate mode (0=Time, 1=Division). 254 = randomize on each trigger. Omit to keep the scene's configured rate mode.

rate_hz_x100.description: Override free-running rate in Hz * 100 (5=0.05Hz, 2000=20.0Hz). 65534 = randomize on each trigger (picker table). Used when rate_mode=free or override-paired with rate_mode=free. Omit to keep the scene's configured rate.

division.description: Override tempo-synced note division (0=16 bars .. 10=1/32). 254 = randomize on each trigger. Used when rate_mode=tempo. Omit to keep the scene's configured division.

floor.description: Override output floor (0-127). 254 = randomize on each trigger (full 0-127 range). Omit to keep the scene's configured floor.

ceiling.description: Override output ceiling (0-127). 254 = randomize on each trigger (full 0-127 range). Omit to keep the scene's configured ceiling.

resolution_mode.description: Override per-cycle resolution mode (0=Auto, 1=Coarse, 2=Medium, 3=Fine, 4=Manual). 254 = randomize on each trigger. Omit to keep the scene's configured resolution mode.

manual_steps.description: Override per-cycle step count when resolution_mode=manual. 254 = randomize on each trigger (16/32/64/128). Has no effect unless paired with a Manual resolution_mode (either via this action or via the scene config). Omit to keep the scene's configured manual_steps.

rate_mode.description: Override rate mode (0=Time, 1=Division). 254 = randomize on each trigger. Omit to keep the scene's configured rate mode.

rate_hz_x100.description: Override free-running rate in Hz * 100 (50=0.5Hz .. 2500=25.0Hz). 65534 = randomize on each trigger. Omit to keep the scene's configured rate.

division.description: Override note division (0=16 bars .. 10=1/32). 254 = randomize on each trigger. Omit to keep the scene's configured divider.

glide.description: Override glide/smooth (0=Off, 1=On). Omit to keep the scene's configured glide.

probability.description: Override step probability 10-100%. 254 = randomize on each trigger. Omit to keep the scene's configured probability.

start_enabled.description: For toggle: first press disables clock (since clock runs by default). For hold: press disables clock.

speed_percent.description: Speed multiplier for burst (25-300% in 25% increments)

start_enabled.description: For toggle: first press disables clock (since clock runs by default). For hold: press disables clock.

speed_percent.description: Speed multiplier for burst (25-300% in 25% increments)

cut_mode.description: What to cut: local (device-generated), passthrough (MIDI IN), or both
What to cut: local (device-generated), passthrough (MIDI IN), or both

confirm_target.description: What to confirm in Advanced mode: preset change or scene change

module.description: Index into scene-selectable UI modules list

num_modules.description: Number of UI modules in cycle

modules.description: UI module indices to cycle through

module.description: Index into scene-selectable UI modules list

num_modules.description: Number of UI modules in cycle

modules.description: UI module indices to cycle through

target.description: Scene CC stream to retarget (must be in Control Change mode when the action runs)

param.description: CC number to apply on press

param2.description: CC number to apply on release (ignored when release_to_original is true)

release_to_original.description: When true, the release phase restores whatever CC and value the target stream had at press time, instead of using param2. The captured values are transient and not persisted.

target.description: Scene CC stream to retarget (must be in Control Change mode when the action runs)

num_params.description: Number of CC values in cycle

params.description: CC numbers to cycle through on the target stream

param.description: CC number to apply on press

param2.description: CC number to apply on release (ignored when release_to_original is true)

release_to_original.description: When true, the release phase restores whatever CC and value the target stream had at press time, instead of using param2.

num_params.description: Number of CC values in cycle

params.description: CC numbers to cycle through on the target stream

step_target.description: Step target: sh (Sample & Hold) or rtg (Random Tone Generator)

start_cc.description: CC number to send at recording start

start_value.description: CC value to send at recording start

finish_cc.description: CC number to send when recording finishes

finish_value.description: CC value to send when recording finishes

duration.description: Duration of punch-in recording (beats or bars)

flag_up_cc.description: CC number to send when flag is up (semaphore = 1)

flag_up_value.description: CC value to send when flag is up

flag_down_cc.description: CC number to send when flag is down (semaphore = 0)

flag_down_value.description: CC value to send when flag is down

output_type.description: Target output type for the boomerang envelope

lfo_target.description: Which LFO to target (when output_type is lfo_rate or lfo_depth)

target_mode.description: Use an explicit target value or a random value within range

target_value.description: Target value (range depends on output_type: 0-127 for CC/LFO/RTG/SH/tempo_nudge, 0-16383 for pitch_bend)

start_mode.description: Capture the live parameter value at trigger time, or use an explicit start_value

start_value.description: Override start value (used when start_mode is explicit; same range as target_value)

attack_time_ms.description: Attack duration in milliseconds (when attack_mode is time_ms)

sustain_time_ms.description: Sustain duration in milliseconds (when sustain_mode is time_ms)

release_time_ms.description: Release duration in milliseconds (when release_mode is time_ms)
